name: Gueorgui Joukov
shortDesc: Maréchal IAP polyvalent — au niveau de Konev en appui-feu.
longDesc: Joukov est un maréchal (IAP, achat réel uniquement) polyvalent de premier rang, au niveau de Konev en appui-feu. Maréchal (5 emplacements).

skills.name: Artillery Leader
skills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding artillery units

skills.name: Accuracy
skills.desc: Deal +6% damage to the enemy when commanding artillery units

skills.name: Explosives
skills.desc: Damage +8% when attacking the stronghold units

skills.name: Crossfire
skills.desc: Counter attack +6% when attacked by the enemy on land

skills.name: Artillery Barrage
skills.desc: Damage to the enemy +10 when the artillery units are more than half damaged
skills.replaceableReason: À confirmer : les Maréchaux IAP ont-ils un emplacement libre ?

stages.label: Entraînement final
stages.notes: Slots max : 5. Coût additionnel : 0 médailles, 100 mérite.

training.summary: Entraînement premium débloquant des compétences signature et augmentant les plafonds d'attributs.

trainedSkills.name: Soviet Deep Battle
trainedSkills.desc: While commanding land units, whenever an enemy within a 3-tile radius is eliminated, your morale is boosted and you gain the “Breakthrough Cluster” status (increasing damage dealt by 3% and stackable up to 42%), which lasts until the end of the stage.
trainedSkills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

trainedSkills.name: Fire-Fighting Captain
trainedSkills.desc: When commanding artillery units, gain +3 mobility. After eliminating an enemy, there is a 70% chance to attack again, which increases by an additional 10% for every 200 HP the unit has.
trainedSkills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).
